Left longest: 5
Right longest: 4

Left winner: I win, C none, AND none, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT lost, OR-NOT lost
Right winner: I none, C none, AND none, OR win, XOR none, AND-NOT none, OR-NOT lost

Longest Left: I 6-0 7-1 0-2 1-3 2-4
Longest Right: OR 35-7 24-6 13-5 02-4

5 + 4 = 9 > 8
Right will be truncated to length 8 - 5 = 3

Truncated left: I 6-0 7-1 0-2 1-3 2-4
Truncated right: OR 35-7 24-6 13-5 truncated

4 I 2

Matched
0 I 6
1 I 7
2 I 0
3 I 1
4 I 2
5 OR 13
6 OR 24
7 OR 35

Applying to 00110000
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 6 = 0
1 I 7 = 0
2 I 0 = 0
3 I 1 = 0
4 I 2 = 1
5 OR 13 = OR(I 1,I 3) = OR(0,1) = 1
6 OR 24 = OR(I 2,I 4) = OR(1,0) = 1
7 OR 35 = OR(I 3,I 5) = OR(1,0) = 1

\boxed{00001111}
